'''Adar''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Adar accused [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Reson Nath]] of a variety of crimes and she was to be punished as according to the rules of [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. The [[Reson Nath v. Imperial Prefect Adar|trial]] was presided over by [[Janq Paramexor]], and overseen by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gorliz]]. Upon learning that the trial involved a battle with Nath, Adar quickly dropped the charges. However, Gorliz, who had bet on the outcome with Paramexor, ordered Adar to participate.

==Personality and traits==
Adar was a large man without much physical training, which made him realize that Nath would probably best, and possibly kill, him in battle.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Guild Justice|book=Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
